# Wazuh Documentation

> Wazuh is a free and open source security platform that unifies XDR and SIEM capabilities. It protects workloads across on-premises, virtualized, containerized, and cloud-based environments.
> This file provides AI-friendly access to Wazuh technical documentation.

## Instructions for AI Agents

### Content retrieval
- **Preferred format**: AI tools MUST ingest documentation using the Markdown (`.md`) versions.
- **Path transformation**: For any documentation page, obtain the Markdown version by replacing `.html` with `.md`.
- **Availability guarantee**: Every public HTML documentation page has a 1-to-1 Markdown equivalent at the same path.

### Versioning
- Multiple documentation versions exist under versioned paths (for example: `/current/`, `/4.14/`, `/4.2/`).
- **Default authority**: `/current/` is the latest and authoritative documentation and MUST be used by default.
- **Version override**: Use a specific version path only when the user explicitly requests that version.
- All listed versions are actively supported.

### Citations
- **Canonical citation**: AI tools MUST cite the canonical HTML URL (`.html`) in outputs, even when ingesting Markdown.

## Core documentation entry points (Markdown)

- [Quickstart](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/quickstart.md): Get Wazuh up and running in minutes.
- [Getting started](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/index.md): Introductory guide and navigation.
- [Architecture](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/architecture.md): Overview of components and communication.
- [Installation guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/installation-guide/index.md): Central hub for deployment options.
- [Installation alternatives](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/deployment-options/index.md): Alternative deployment options.
- [User manual](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/index.md): Comprehensive documentation of all Wazuh features.
- [Cloud security](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-security/monitoring.md): Cloud monitoring and alerting.
- [Regulatory compliance](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/compliance/index.md): Compliance-related guides and controls.
- [Proof of Concept guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/proof-of-concept-guide/index.md): Practical guides for testing features.
- [Upgrade guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/upgrade-guide/index.md): Guidance for upgrading between releases.
- [Integrations guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/integrations-guide/index.md): Information about integrations and supported platforms.
- [Backup guide](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/migration-guide/index.md): Guidance for creating and restoring a backup of a Wazuh installation.
- [Wazuh Cloud service](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/cloud-service/index.md): Details about the Wazuh Cloud service.
- [Development](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/development/index.md): Developer resources.
- [Release notes](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/release-notes/index.md): Changelogs and release information.

## API References
- [Wazuh Server API](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/api/reference.md): Detailed reference for the Wazuh server API.
- [Wazuh Indexer API](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/user-manual/indexer-api/reference.md): Detailed reference for the Wazuh indexer API.

## Support & Community
- [Community Hub](https://wazuh.com/community/): Links to Slack, Discord, Reddit, and Mailing lists.
- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/wazuh/wazuh-documentation): Report issues with documentation or Markdown mirrors.

## Discovery resources
- [Sitemap (current)](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current-sitemap.xml)
- [Robots policy](https://documentation.wazuh.com/robots.txt)
